Usage:
  circleci orb publish promote <ns>/<orb>@dev:<label> major|minor|patch [flags]

Examples:
# Promote dev:my-branch to a patch release
$ circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch patch

# Promote to a minor release
$ circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch minor

# Promote to a major release
$ circleci orb publish promote myorg/my-orb@dev:my-branch major


Global Flags:
  -c, --config string   path to config file (default: ~/.config/circleci/config.yml)
      --debug           enable debug logging
  -q, --quiet           suppress informational output; data on stdout is unaffected
